core_identity.terrain: Medieval fragmented civilization, balanced terrain world, no extreme elemental dominance.

races.name: Humans
roles: builders of kingdoms and trade networks

political_structure.government_model: Symbolic Monarchy with Fragmented Independent Regions
political_structure.ruler_role: Symbolic monarch of the continent, residing officially in his royal seat of Ravenshire. He maintains political balance between independent regions and has no direct control over cities.
political_structure.lore: King Aldren Vaelor rules symbolically from his royal seat in Ravenshire, keeping peace and managing diplomacy while the independent city-states control their own military forces, mining, and maritime trade.

core_identity.atmosphere: Classic high fantasy medieval world, busy trade ports, active mining frontlines, and peaceful safe zones.

settlements.name: Ironhold Bastion
settlements.description: Beginner safe hub, training grounds, initial player entry point. Stationed with Mayor George and Guard Will. Represents the starter economy.

settlements.name: Stone Tirith
settlements.description: Dwarven civilization center, weapon crafting capital, rich mining + forge economy.

settlements.name: Blackwater Bay
settlements.description: Global shipping hub, piracy zone, contraband and black market economy, major world travel port.

settlements.name: Ravenshire
settlements.description: The official political and commercial capital of the Main Continent, and the royal seat of King Aldren Vaelor. Its identity is centered around noble houses, diplomacy, aristocracy, high commerce, and guild influence (strictly non-military).

settlements.name: Thornwall
settlements.description: Diplomatic mixed-race city of humans, elven descendants, and green orcs. Nature economy hub, resource harvesting zone.

core_identity.terrain: Volcanic terrain dominated by active magma fields, basalt mountains, and ash plains, centered around the colossal living Primordial Volcano.

races.name: Fire Cyclopes
roles: creators of the world's best weapons

ruler.name: Ignis Rex
ruler.title: Fire Mage King
ruler.lore: Possessed by a Lesser General of the Fire Primordial. This entity heavily influences all decisions but does not fully override the King's identity.

core_identity.atmosphere: Volcanic fantasy, industrial forge culture, a war-driven civilization under constant elemental fire dominance.

settlements.name: Pyra Magnus
settlements.description: The monumental volcanic capital city, seat of the Fire Mage King, serving as the political and arcane epicenter of the continent.

settlements.name: Crimson Hollow
settlements.description: An aggressive Red Orc stronghold, military expansion hub, and epicenter of the war arena culture.

settlements.name: Molten Anvil
settlements.description: The ultimate forging city inhabited by Fire Cyclopes, powered by raw magma streams to craft the finest weapons in the world.

settlements.name: Primordial Volcano
settlements.governor: Lesser Generals of the Fire Primordial
settlements.description: The living core volcano and natural prison of Fire Demons. Rich in primordial fire energy and high-danger PvE encounters.

core_identity.terrain: Primordial frozen continent with frozen tundras, snowy mountain chains, frozen lakes, icy valleys, glacial cliffs, and dangerous blizzards. This cold is entirely natural and primordial, not magical or cursed.

ruler.name: Kaelthar Elaris
ruler.title: King of the Frozen Crown
ruler.role: political ruler, military authority, and protector of the continent
ruler.lore: Distant relative of the Nature Continent's elven royal bloodline, sharing the ancestral Elaris surname.

jotunn_advisor.name: Ymirr Stonefrost
jotunn_advisor.role: Ancient hidden advisor to the king
jotunn_advisor.lore: Lives deep inside dangerous mountain interiors beyond Khaz Tirith. Extremely difficult to reach; only kings, selected dwarves, and exceptional heroes may seek his counsel to influence critical decisions.

core_identity.atmosphere: Nordic fantasy, harsh survival in a frozen wilderness with ancient civilizations enduring the elemental cold.

settlements.name: Elarisheim
settlements.description: Capital of the Frost Elves and seat of King Kaelthar. Features the grand ice palace, crystalline towers, frozen gardens, and noble districts.

settlements.name: Frosthaven
settlements.description: Main human settlement and bustling trade port. Features busy docks, icebreaker ships, salted fish trade, and warm warrior lodges.

settlements.name: Khaz Tirith
settlements.description: Ancient dwarven fortress carved into the frozen mountain heart. Gateway to the forbidden mountains where Ymirr resides. Features deep ice crystal mines and ancient runeforges.

settlements.name: Ymirr's Hidden Cavern
settlements.description: A secluded and extremely dangerous mountain interior where the legendary Jötunn advisor, Ymirr Stonefrost, lives.
settlements.accessible_via: future questlines, mountain traversal, or dungeon access

core_identity.terrain: Naturally sacred continent, sacred golden plains, holy forests, crystalline rivers, sacred sanctuaries, fortified military frontiers

seraphim_lore.rule: Only 5 Seraphim exist in the world. 4 live in isolated temples rarely interacting with mortals, and 1 participates in governance.

political_structure.government_model: Holy Council (True Triune Council with equal authority)

members.name: Aurelius Dawnbringer
members.title: High Lord of Sacred Order
members.authority: Equal member of the Triune Council. May act as primus inter pares (first among equals) only for diplomatic and military urgency, with no unilateral ruling authority.

members.name: Aelthir Luminar
members.title: Keeper of Sacred Wisdom
members.authority: Equal member of the Triune Council. Preserves the ancient history and wisdom of the land.

members.name: Seraphiel
members.title: Voice of Divine Light
members.authority: Equal member of the Triune Council. Guides spiritual judgment and preserves celestial balance.

core_identity.atmosphere: Sacred medieval fantasy with divine light, majestic architecture, spiritual power, and rigid, disciplined, highly moral, judgmental order. Light does not always equal mercy.

settlements.name: Luminaar
settlements.governor: Council Triune of Light (Aurelius, Aelthir, Seraphiel)
settlements.description: Political and spiritual capital. Seat of the Council Triune of Light. Features a divine cathedral, council palace, holy libraries, and sacred plazas.

settlements.name: Lunareth
settlements.description: Ancient High Elf city hidden within sacred forests. Center of holy arcane knowledge, featuring arcane sanctuaries, sacred groves, white towers, and celestial observatories.

settlements.name: Sunwall
settlements.description: Massive fortress defending the continent. Features giant walls, paladin barracks, training grounds, and defensive temples.

central_region.name: Heart of Light
central_region.description: The unique central sacred region of the continent. Features the Primordial Crystal of Light.
central_region.core_object_description: A massive primordial crystal that has existed since the creation of the world.
properties: source of the continent's sacred nature
central_region.lore: The continent is naturally holy because of the crystal. The crystal was never created, summoned, or blessed. It has always existed.

travel.access: Restricted. Requires Level 50+ and completion of the quest 'holy_continent_access_trial'.

core_identity.terrain: Primordial native darkness, gothic medieval plains, constant fog, decayed civilization
core_identity.civilization: Vampires, Undead, Black Orcs, Dark Elves, Cultists, Lycanthropes, Liches, and Necromancers
core_identity.atmosphere: Gothic medieval fantasy with constant fog, decayed civilizations, and permanent political tension

settlements.name: Noctharyn
settlements.description: Grand gothic capital ruled by Count Valdrak Nocthar, featuring blood magic academies and noble vampire houses.

settlements.name: Grimharbor
settlements.description: Main entry point for foreign visitors, filled with black markets, smugglers, and mercenaries.

settlements.name: Kar'goth
settlements.description: Stronghold of Black Orc clans featuring war camps, iron forges, and siege workshops.

settlements.name: Necrathis
settlements.description: Main undead city ruled by Morthak, featuring a giant necropolis, bone towers, and undead legions.

settlements.name: Vel'Sharum
settlements.description: City of rituals, forbidden magic, dark temples, and forbidden libraries.

central_region.name: Ashen Wastes
central_region.description: Ancient plain covered in gray ash, serving as a frontier between northern and southern powers, filled with giant skeletons, cursed graveyards, dead forests, and necromantic fog.

travel.access: Accessible by ship without mandatory quest

core_identity.economy: Focused on herbalism and crafting materials

core_identity.terrain: Corrupted void, floating abyssal islands, ruins, and deep dark chasms.
core_identity.atmosphere: Post-apocalyptic void, extreme high-level endgame content, abyssal horror.

ruler.name: Commander Varian
ruler.title: Grand Marshal of the Last Bastion
ruler.lore: The last standing grand marshal of the human forces defending the threshold between the human world and the void.

settlements.name: Last Bastion
settlements.description: The absolute last human resistance outpost standing in the Abyss. Serves as a safe zone, respawn point, repair hub, vendor base, and quest headquarters.

regions_and_zones.name: Abyssal Void Rift Ruins
regions_and_zones.description: The shattered remnants of a grand ancient civilization, now crawling with high-danger void creatures.

regions_and_zones.name: Crystalline Corrupted Zone
regions_and_zones.description: A high-risk traversal zone covered in purple crystal growths leaking raw abyssal corruption.

travel.access: Restricted ship travel. Requires level 150+, completion of the endgame questline, and the Abyssi access permission flag.
